bosses.name: The Keep Warden
bosses.telegraph: The Warden hefts its cleaver. Below half health its fury doubles - end it quickly or guard through the rage.
bosses.description: A towering brute that guards the ruined keep.

bosses.name: The Crystal Sorcerer
bosses.telegraph: Frost gathers around the Sorcerer. Every fallen servant feeds its magic - strike the master before the coven falls.
bosses.description: A mage who weaves ice and venom in the crystal depths.

bosses.name: The Hollow Commander
bosses.telegraph: The Commander signals the pack. Wounded below half, it will rally its fallen once - silence it before the horn sounds.
bosses.description: A cunning leader who fights amid a loyal warband.

bosses.name: The Endless Tyrant
bosses.telegraph: The Tyrant surges forward. Its opening blow lands with doubled force - guard the first strike, then answer.
bosses.description: A tyrant who throws wave upon wave of minions.
